app.name: Learnex
app.description: The social platform built for students. Share knowledge, collaborate on projects, and thrive together on campus.
app.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your student account
app.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your account email and we'll send a password reset link.
app.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the reset token and choose a new password.
app.termsAgreement: By creating an account you agree to our

features.studyTogetherDesc: Join subject groups & collaborate on coursework.
features.realTimeMessagingDesc: DMs and group chats with your classmates.
features.campusFeedDesc: Stay updated on events, posts & announcements.

search.title: Search
search.emptyDescription: Search for students by name or email, or discover posts by topic.
search.noPeopleDescription: No students match "{{query}}". Try a different name or email.
search.noPostsDescription: No posts mention "{{query}}". Try a different term or hashtag.

messages.resetLinkSent: If the email exists, a reset link was sent.
messages.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successful — you can now sign in.
messages.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
messages.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.
messages.pleaseSignInAgain: Please sign in again to continue.
messages.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
